LanguageData.PM_Role_SweepingCoordinator.label: sweeping coordinator
LanguageData.PM_Role_SweepingCoordinator.description: An ideological status focused on cleaning the Backstreets. This role increases cleaning and deconstruction speed.
LanguageData.PM_Precept_FilthAbhorrent.label: filth abhorrent
LanguageData.PM_Precept_FilthAbhorrent.description: Filth is an offense. A worthy Sweeper cleans relentlessly, and suffers in the presence of grime.
LanguageData.PM_Precept_StayInShadows.label: toil in shadow
LanguageData.PM_Precept_StayInShadows.description: The Sweepers' place is in shadow. The City sends them to clean the Backstreets during the Night; exposing oneself to daylight is a transgression.
